name: Chocolate Cream Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherry juice into a bowl; set aside.
2. Drain the cherries on paper towels and discard any excess liquid.
3. In a pastry bag fitted with a small tip, add a small amount of chocolate cream.
4. Pipe the chocolate cream into each cherry half.
5. Reserve the remaining cherry juice for later use.
6. Place the reserved juice in a saucepan over medium heat.
7. Heat the juice until it reaches boiling point.
8. Reduce the heat and allow the sauce to cool until it coats a spoon lightly.
This recipe was posted on Fabfood in August 1998 by melizajane@aol.com.
